# Steve Hsu (什五)'s Link-Hub

> Personal multi-language link-hub consolidating profiles across creative,
> social, and development platforms. Built with TypeScript + Vite, deployed on GitHub Pages.
> Supports English, Simplified Chinese (zh-Hans), and Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant).

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/): Landing page with featured links and site overview.
- [About](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/about.html): Biography, skills, tools, and contact info.
- [Artworks & Videos](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/artworks-and-videos.html): Portfolio — illustrations, animations, and video works across platforms.
- [Blogs & Sponsor](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/blogs-and-sponsor.html): Writing platforms, donation links, and sponsorship.
- [Chatting](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/chatting.html): Social media and instant messaging profiles.
- [Softwares](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/softwares.html): Software projects, development tools, and code-hosting profiles.

## Project

- [Source Code](https://github.com/stevehsudrawing/stevehsudrawing.github.io): GitHub repository.
- [Image Copyright](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/images/README.md): Artwork copyright notice and usage restrictions.
- [Sitemap](https://stevehsudrawing.github.io/sitemap.xml): Full site structure for crawlers.
